solutions.solution: (c) A⇒s, B⇒=, C⇒<, D⇒≥, E⇒≠, F⇒>. 2MBN ⇒ 2M=N ⇒ M=N/2. Also 2NA3K ⇒ 2N≠3K ⇒ 4M≠3K. Now checking each option one by one. From option (a), 2MD3K ⇒ 2M>3K (false). From option (b), 2MB3K ⇒ 2M=3K (false). From option (c), 2MC3K ⇒ 2M<3K (true). From option (d), 2KB3N ⇒ 2K=3N (false)

(c) Let us check all the options one by one. From option (a), 9÷7×2+3=10 ⇒ 9/7×2+3=10 ⇒ 18/7+3=10 ⇒ (18+21)/7=10 ⇒ 39/7=10. ∴ LHS≠RHS. So, option (a) is incorrect. From option (b), 9-7+2÷3=10 ⇒ 9-7+2/3=10 ⇒ (27-21+2)/3=10 ⇒ 8/3=10. ∴ LHS≠RHS. So, option (b) is incorrect. From option (c), 9+7-2×3=10 ⇒ 9+7-6=10 ⇒ 10=10. ∴ LHS=RHS. So, option (c) is correct and there is no need to check option (d).
